'''竏營-dh-zh''' ('''shazadhazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:narrativize|narrativize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:narrativize|narrativize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| shazadhazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhazh|thizadhazh]] || [[word:jizadhazh|jizadhazh]] || [[word:shizadhazh|shizadhazh]] || [[word:kizadhazh|kizadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhazh|thuthuzadhazh]] || [[word:jujuzadhazh|jujuzadhazh]] || [[word:shushuzadhazh|shushuzadhazh]] || [[word:kukuzadhazh|kukuzadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadhazh|thuzadhazh]] || [[word:juzadhazh|juzadhazh]] || [[word:shuzadhazh|shuzadhazh]] || [[word:kuzadhazh|kuzadhazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadhazh|thuzadhazh]] || [[word:juzadhazh|juzadhazh]] || [[word:shuzadhazh|shuzadhazh]] || [[word:kuzadhazh|kuzadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadhazh|thezadhazh]] || [[word:jezadhazh|jezadhazh]] || [[word:shezadhazh|shezadhazh]] || [[word:kezadhazh|kezadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozadhazh|thothozadhazh]] || [[word:jojozadhazh|jojozadhazh]] || [[word:shoshozadhazh|shoshozadhazh]] || [[word:kokozadhazh|kokozadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadhazh|thozadhazh]] || [[word:jozadhazh|jozadhazh]] || [[word:shozadhazh|shozadhazh]] || [[word:kozadhazh|kozadhazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhazh|thozadhazh]] || [[word:jozadhazh|jozadhazh]] || [[word:shozadhazh|shozadhazh]] || [[word:kozadhazh|kozadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzadhazh|thﾃｦzadhazh]] || [[word:jﾃｦzadhazh|jﾃｦzadhazh]] || [[word:shﾃｦzadhazh|shﾃｦzadhazh]] || [[word:kﾃｦzadhazh|kﾃｦzadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadhazh|thathazadhazh]] || [[word:jajazadhazh|jajazadhazh]] || [[word:shashazadhazh|shashazadhazh]] || [[word:kakazadhazh|kakazadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadhazh|thazadhazh]] || [[word:jazadhazh|jazadhazh]] || [[word:shazadhazh|shazadhazh]] || [[word:kazadhazh|kazadhazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhazh|thazadhazh]] || [[word:jazadhazh|jazadhazh]] || [[word:shazadhazh|shazadhazh]] || [[word:kazadhazh|kazadhazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazadhazh|shazadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazadhazh|goshazadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazadhazh|gokishazadhazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazadhazhnﾃｼ|shazadhazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnknﾃｼ|goshazadhazhnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhnﾃｼ|gokishazadhazhnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazadhazhshﾃｫ|shazadhazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫ|goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhshﾃｫ|gokishazadhazhshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhazhro|shazadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkro|goshazadhazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhro|gokishazadhazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhazhmu|shazadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkmu|goshazadhazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhmu|gokishazadhazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazadhazhsher|shazadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnksher|goshazadhazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhsher|gokishazadhazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazadhazhng|shazadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkng|goshazadhazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhng|gokishazadhazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazadhazhya|shazadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkya|goshazadhazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhya|gokishazadhazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazadhazhyam|shazadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkyam|goshazadhazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhyam|gokishazadhazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shazadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshazadhazhnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishazadhazhnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhazhnﾃｼro|shazadhazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnknﾃｼro|goshazadhazhnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhnﾃｼro|gokishazadhazhnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhazhnﾃｼmu|shazadhazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnknﾃｼmu|goshazadhazhnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhnﾃｼmu|gokishazadhazhnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shazadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishazadhazhshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhazhshﾃｫro|shazadhazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫro|goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhshﾃｫro|gokishazadhazhshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhazhshﾃｫmu|shazadhazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫmu|goshazadhazhnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhshﾃｫmu|gokishazadhazhshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadhazhronﾃｼ|shazadhazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkronﾃｼ|goshazadhazhnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhronﾃｼ|gokishazadhazhronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadhazhroshﾃｫ|shazadhazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkroshﾃｫ|goshazadhazhnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhroshﾃｫ|gokishazadhazhroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazadhazhromu|shazadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkromu|goshazadhazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhromu|gokishazadhazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazadhazhmunﾃｼ|shazadhazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkmunﾃｼ|goshazadhazhnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhmunﾃｼ|gokishazadhazhmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazadhazhmushﾃｫ|shazadhazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkmushﾃｫ|goshazadhazhnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhmushﾃｫ|gokishazadhazhmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazadhazhmuro|shazadhazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazadhazhnkmuro|goshazadhazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazadhazhmuro|gokishazadhazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
